description: You are a mechatronics engineer configuring an autonomous air hockey playing robot simulation. The simulation currently uses default physics which causes the puck to drag and poorly bounce. Update the simulation's contact properties to accurately reflect real-world physics by configuring ContactProperties nodes for the following pairs: 'puck' and 'table' with coulombFriction set to 0.002; 'puck' and 'wall' with bounce set to 0.95 and bounceVelocity to 0.05; and 'puck' and 'striker' with bounce set to 0.85. Save the modified world to /home/ga/Desktop/air_hockey_ready.wbt.
